data.title: Housing Inflation Had Its Lowest Uptick In March But Is Now The Worst Time To Buy A House?
data.description: Housing inflation shows signs of easing, but buyers still face high prices and volatile mortgage rates. Personal stability is key when deciding to buy now or wait.

data.title: China's $8.2 Billion Fund Targets AI Startups In The Race For Global Tech Leadership
data.description: China sets up $8.2 billion fund for AI projects, signaling its determination to lead the global race. It comes amid trade tensions and focus on tech self-sufficiency.

data.title: 'Every Billionaire Who Needs More Than $999M Is Kind Of A Sociopath,'  Says Abigail Disney
data.description: Abigail Disney, heir to Disney fortune, criticizes Trump and Musk for unbridled privilege and advocates for systemic change.

data.title: Federal Judge Clears Trump Plan Requiring Undocumented Immigrants To Register Or Face Penalties
Over 6,000 Immigrants Declared Dead By Social Security In Effort To Revoke Benefits And Force 'Self-Deportation'
data.description: The Trump administration has reclassified over 6,000 immigrants as deceased, stripping them of work eligibility and pushing them to leave the country. This has sparked legal challenges and criticism of overreach by the administration. Many of those targeted had legal status under Biden-era programs.
